category_title: Students who talk out to escape writing tasks
minimal_context: Benjamin is sitting at his desk during independent work time, tasked with writing a topic sentence for his assignment.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Benjamin, it is time for independent work. Please start writing your topic sentence for the assignment.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: Did you know my favorite superhero has a shield that can block anything? I want to tell you all about the movie I saw!

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: We need to focus on the assignment right now. Please write your sentence.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: Writing sentences is too hard. I'm not ready to learn. Can I just go to the calm down area instead?

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: You need to stay in your seat and keep trying to write your topic sentence.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Turns away from the desk and talks out loudly to peers) Hey guys, I'm not doing this writing! Watch me make superhero noises instead! Whoosh! Pow!

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Benjamin, it is time for independent work. Please start writing your topic sentence for the assignment.

STUDENT: Did you know my favorite superhero has a shield that can block anything? I want to tell you all about the movie I saw!

TUTOR: We need to focus on the assignment right now. Please write your sentence.

STUDENT: Writing sentences is too hard. I'm not ready to learn. Can I just go to the calm down area instead?

TUTOR: You need to stay in your seat and keep trying to write your topic sentence.

STUDENT: (Turns away from the desk and talks out loudly to peers) Hey guys, I'm not doing this writing! Watch me make superhero noises instead! Whoosh! Pow!

task.content: Writing assignments involving writing sentences, broken into steps (i.e., topic sentence, detail sentence)

context.environment: Independent work time in Ms. Lee's classroom
context.materials: Writing prompts, graphic organizers in the shape of superhero shields, colored communication cards (red card, yellow card, green card), drawing materials, reinforcer menu
context.social_setting: Independent work time with peers present

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: The longer he engaged in a writing task, or when work tasks were combined with skill deficits
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Escalate forms of problem behavior to escape the task
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: Writing sentences was aversive, and his motivation to get out of the task increased

behavior_patterns.condition: During writing assignments to delay the start of his writing task or avoid it entirely
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Continuous talk outs and repeatedly engage in the same disruptive off-task and talking-out behaviors
behavior_patterns.internal_state: Motivation to get out of the task increased
